title: Color Changer
description: A client-side mod which can change biome colors with a command during runtime
body:
# Color Changer
This is a simple client-side mod for Forge 1.19.4, 1.20, and 1.20.1. It adds the command `/colors` which allows you to modify biome colors in-game. Changes are not saved when you quit the game, but they do persist between worlds if you don't close the game. You can change the color of the sky, water, foliage, water fog, grass, and fog. The command also allows you to reset a biome color to the default.
